scope: Port donor task discriminators, task registry lookup, stop validation, and compact background-task pill labels into AgenC's live task subsystem.

requiredBehaviors: Expose a typed AppState task discriminator for local shell, local agent, remote agent, and in-process teammate tasks.
Keep lifecycle-only generic and monitor task kinds available to the in-process background-task lifecycle.
Reject donor-only workflow, MCP monitor, and dream task kinds from live task lookup.
edgeCases: terminal statuses are not background tasks
foreground tasks with isBackgrounded false are not background tasks
dropped task kind strings do not narrow to live task kinds

requiredBehaviors: Return a deterministic registry list for all live task kinds.
Stop dispatch delegates to the caller-supplied lifecycle stop implementation.
Missing backing stop support fails instead of marking task state killed.
edgeCases: dropped donor task kinds return undefined
delegate errors surface as stop failures

requiredBehaviors: Lifecycle-backed stops preserve current pending-or-running stop semantics.
Local shell stops mark notifications only after a successful backing stop.
edgeCases: unsupported task kind fails before invoking the stop delegate
notification suppression does not run when backing stop fails
TaskStop shell_id aliases still resolve through the injected lifecycle

requiredBehaviors: Format shell and monitor counts from local shell task kind.
Format team counts from in-process teammate identities.
Format local agent and remote cloud-session counts.
Surface remote ultraplanning attention labels and CTA state.
edgeCases: CTA only for one remote ultraplanning task with an attention phase
